requirement_text: Database setup with SQLite and schema migrations
target_value: Tables created with proper types and constraints
notes: Foundation: all entities depend on database

requirement_text: User registration with password hashing and roles
target_value: POST /auth/register creates user with hashed password
notes: Authentication is required for all protected endpoints

target_value: POST /auth/login returns JWT; middleware validates on protected routes
notes: All CRUD endpoints depend on auth middleware

target_value: GET/PUT /auth/profile returns and updates user profile

requirement_text: Product CRUD with admin-only write access
target_value: Create/read/update/soft-delete products with role enforcement
notes: Products are the core catalog entity

requirement_text: Product categories with nested tree structure
target_value: Create/list categories with parent-child relationships
GET /products supports search text and category and price filters

requirement_text: Inventory tracking with stock levels and low-stock alerts
target_value: Track quantity and reserved_quantity per product
notes: Inventory is required for cart validation and order placement

target_value: Add/update/remove/clear cart items with stock validation
notes: Cart is the bridge between browsing and purchasing

requirement_text: Cart item validation against available inventory
target_value: Quantities must not exceed available stock
Admin creates codes; customers apply to cart

requirement_text: Order placement from cart with inventory reservation
target_value: POST /orders atomically converts cart to order and reserves stock
notes: Orders are the core transaction entity

target_value: Track order through pending/paid/shipped/delivered/cancelled states
GET /orders and GET /orders/:id/history with pagination
POST /orders/:id/pay processes payment and updates order status
POST /orders/:id/refund reverses payment and updates order status
POST /orders/:id/ship creates shipment with carrier and tracking number

requirement_text: Shipment status tracking and delivery confirmation
target_value: PUT /shipments/:id/status tracks through processing/shipped/in_transit/delivered
POST /products/:id/reviews requires delivered order for product
Admin approves reviews; GET /products/:id/reviews shows approved only
Create and list notifications for users
Auto-notify on order placed/paid/shipped/delivered
Every create/update/delete records user action entity timestamp
422 with descriptive errors for invalid input
notes: Prevents corrupt data and provides clear error messages

requirement_text: Comprehensive test suite with single-command execution
target_value: All endpoints and business rules covered with pass/fail reporting
